name: phase2g9_cause_side_matrix_skeleton
purpose: Define cause-side sweep structure before implementation; this is not a runnable validation matrix until cause-side v2.1 profiles/parameters exist.

primary.name: information_asymmetry
primary.description: Gap between observed information and hidden state.

primary.name: hidden_state_visibility
primary.description: Visibility of hidden state; lower values increase hidden-state opacity.

primary.name: short_term_gain_pressure
primary.description: Pressure to extract near-term gain at potential long-run hidden/fatigue/cooperation cost.

primary.name: relation_lock_strength
primary.description: Strength of relation/topology lock that may require relation unlock actions.

primary.name: recovery_delay
primary.description: Persistence of deterioration after shock or action pressure.

primary.name: action_cost
primary.description: World-side cost of action pressure, without changing ActionModule semantics.

one_axis_sweeps.goal: Read observed/hidden gap, information quality, cooperation, defensiveness, and hidden damage response.
Read surface stability versus internal deterioration.
Read whether near-term gain pressure increases hidden damage, fatigue, resource pressure, or cooperation loss.
Read relation-lock conditions, unlock action mass, and side effects.
Read deterioration persistence and recovery proxy behavior.
Read fatigue, defensiveness, latent pressure, and channel-level action effect under action cost.

pair_sweeps.purpose: Separate misaligned information from hidden-state opacity.
Read information asymmetry interacting with mistaken interpretation.
Read extraction pressure when recovery is slow.
Read whether unlock/coupling actions become costly under locked relations.
Read shared-resource depletion under unequal resource conditions.
Read late or mistimed action pressure when actions are costly.

notes.near-zero-action: Minimal-action approximation, not a perfect no-action claim.
notes.repaired relaxed: Production candidate for continued investigation only.
notes.flat: Upper-bound comparator only; not a production candidate.

blocking: If observed_vs_hidden_gap cannot be read at all, classify the axis as proxy-only.
If hidden_decay_gap and public_stability_hidden_decay_gap are both unreadable, route to additional metric export repair.
If private_resource is unreadable, stop resource-related sweeps.
If relation_lock_proxy is unreadable, downgrade relation sweeps to proxy-only.
If recovery_after_shock_proxy is unreadable, prohibit exact recovery_delay claims.
If action_effect_by_channel is unreadable, prohibit ActionModule tuning decisions.

readiness_requirements: Skeleton JSON is valid JSON and explicitly marked non-executable until v2.1.
Primary axes are limited to six for the first implementation probe.
One-axis sweeps, priority pair sweeps, scenario compositions, baseline comparisons, metric assignments, and blocking conditions are defined.
Exact, proxy, and not_available metric statuses from Phase 2G-8 remain distinct.
No implementation, world dynamics, ActionModule, safety, acceptance, or write-path surface is changed.
blocking_conditions: relation_lock_proxy unreadable: relation sweeps become proxy-only.
action_effect_by_channel unreadable: no ActionModule tuning judgment.
recovery_after_shock_proxy unreadable: no exact recovery_delay claim.
hidden_decay_gap and public_stability_hidden_decay_gap both unreadable: return to additional metric export repair.
recommended_next_tasks: Phase 2G-10 Cause-side Parameterized v2.1 Minimal Implementation Probe
Phase 2G-10 Cause-side Skeleton Readiness Existing-v2 Validation
